value.body:
## Context

A final merge decision needs evidence, not just a text summary. Agents should leave durable verification artifacts on the ticket.

## Outcome

Agent runs record commands, test output summaries, screenshots, logs, generated files, and manual verification notes as structured artifacts linked to the ticket and run.

## Acceptance criteria

- Agent runtime can attach named artifacts with type, size, source path/reference, timestamp, and summary.
- Common artifact types include test-log, diff-summary, screenshot, build-output, coverage, and note.
- Handoff UI shows artifact list and highlights failed or skipped verification.
- Artifact storage has retention and redaction rules for secrets and excessive logs.
- Tests cover artifact creation, listing, redaction, and UI rendering.

frontmatter.title: Capture verification artifacts and test evidence for agent work

value.title: Capture verification artifacts and test evidence for agent work
